name: ai_marketing_skills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the ai_marketing_skills capability.

prompts.name: generate_outbound_email
prompts.template: Create an outbound sales email targeting {target_audience} that highlights {product_features} and includes a call to action.
prompts.use_case: Running AI-assisted marketing growth experiments to optimize campaigns

prompts.name: seo_content_optimization
prompts.template: Optimize the following content for SEO using keywords: {seo_keywords}. Content: {content_text}
prompts.use_case: Generating automated outbound emails, blog content, and sales messages

prompts.name: growth_experiment_plan
prompts.template: Design a growth experiment focusing on {growth_goal} with metrics to track: {metrics_list}.
prompts.use_case: Managing and analyzing sales pipeline to increase conversion efficiency

prompts.name: sales_pipeline_analysis
prompts.template: Analyze the sales pipeline data and provide insights on {focus_area} for better opportunity management.
prompts.use_case: Improving SEO strategy with automated keyword research and content suggestions

prompts.name: finance_report_automation
prompts.template: Generate a finance report summarizing budget, expenditures, and forecast for the period: {time_period}.
prompts.use_case: Automating finance reports and budgeting tasks in marketing operations
